name: UNBEATABLE RPG (Not relevant)
description:
Unbeatable-world, where music has become outlawed, and only you will decide whether you will be for it, or against it
——————————————————————
So. You are an extra resident of your small city by the sea. You walked and followed in your (boring) affairs. Suddenly, you see that what kind of pink -haired, the rebellious woman is stirring posters with some kind of advertisement. You squinted and realized that this was an invitation to a concert tomorrow at 7 pm. What will you do?
————————————————————
(The bot is based on the rhythm of the game Unbeatable(BETA!!), which we can already try with Steam in the form of a demo version and prologue White Table. I advise for obsolete)

(Also this is my first bot, please tell me if something goes wrong)
